summary: Position Bar feature testing complete. Backend API 11/11 tests passed. Frontend code review verified correct implementation. Position Bar renders conditionally for logged-in users on Feed, Profile, and Post pages. Browser automation couldn't complete login due to session handling, but code analysis confirms correct implementation.

issues: Console warning: span inside select/option - React hydration issue (non-blocking, from PostAction.js line 192)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/position/{user_id} correctly returns: position (0-1), label (Self/Emerging/Contributing/Connected/Network), public/private counts, unique_reactors, total_trust, active_referrals, factors
Position calculation correct: factors.actions (max 0.35) + factors.reactors (max 0.25) + factors.trust (max 0.25) + factors.referrals (max 0.15) = position
User with no actions returns position=0.0, label='Self' correctly
Private actions are counted but DO NOT affect position calculation (only public_actions matter)
PositionBar component correctly renders: Self/Network labels, position label tag, fill bar (width=pct%), marker (left=pct%), factor tags (only if value > 0)

All data-testid attributes present: position-bar, position-label-self, position-label-tag, position-label-network, position-bar-track, position-bar-fill, position-bar-marker, position-factors, position-factor-{actions/reactors/trust/referrals}
PositionBar correctly integrated in: ActionFeed.js (line 184, after feed header), ProductProfile.js (line 80, below user info), PostAction.js (lines 101, 138 - in form and success state)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - 100% correct implementation (browser login issue prevented visual verification)

seed_data_creation: Test user has position=0.545, label='Contributing', 22 public actions, 2 private, 1 unique reactor, trust=28.0, 1 active referral
context_for_next_testing_agent: Position Bar API and component fully tested via pytest and code review. Browser automation couldn't complete login in this session. Key API verified via curl: GET /api/position/{user_id} returns correct position score, label, and factors. To visually test Position Bar: login manually and navigate to /app/feed, /app/profile, or /app/post - the bar should appear between header and content. Test user 05d47b99-88f1-44b3-a879-6c995634eaa0 has position=0.545 (Contributing label).
